body.u: Looking back on the day I left school.
I left school on 26th May 78. In a weeksweeks' time I would start my first job.
I got a job working in a shop, with my mother, the days went quick when I started work but it was much more harder work, than school.
I was eighteen when I got married my first child arrived and I had a baby girl her name was Lynda, later on came Susan our second.
Lynda got married and went to live in Yorkshire with her husband.
About 3 months afterwards Susan got married.
At the age of 43 I retired from work and just done odd things around the house like cook, clean, tidy ectetc.
There was only my husband at work now it was a bit much for my husband but he never complanedcomplained, he was a good man.
At the age of 60 my husband died I missed him really a lot.
At the age of 62 and I am the only one here.
Lynda is still in Yorkshire with 4 lovely children of her own.
And Susan her husband died so she is left with two children.
“But at least I have had a good life and still have my memories with me”….
